summary: Created the all-locale Apple HIG localized UI completion path. Added a dedicated workflow doc, linked it from the docs map, updated localization quality status, and queued the remaining evidence, automation, native-review, HIG gate, remediation, and closure slices without claiming all-locale HIG readiness.
validations_passed: python3 -c "import json; from automation.supervisor import policy; doc=json.load(open('automation/queue/slices.json')); schema=json.load(open('automation/schemas/slice.schema.json')); result=policy.validate_document(doc, schema); print('valid' if result.is_valid else '\n'.join(result.errors)); raise SystemExit(0 if result.is_valid else 1)"

contract_status_changes.contract: All-locale Apple HIG localized UI completion
contract_status_changes.before: The repo required scoped HIG review for localized UI claims, but no complete all-locale completion ladder existed after the German gate failure and reflection nudge fix.
contract_status_changes.after: A documented all-locale completion contract exists and the queue now contains the remaining setup, native-review, HIG gate, remediation, and blocked closure slices. All-locale hig-ui-reviewed remains unclaimed.

residual_risks: Seventeen non-German locales still require native or fluent review before final HIG label/action clarity can be claimed.
The multisurface screenshot harness, Dynamic Type/accessibility harness, bucketed HIG gates, remediation triage, and closure are queued or blocked follow-up work.
Device and TestFlight proof remain unclaimed unless future slices preserve those artifacts.
recommended_next_reason: The evidence matrix is the first eligible slice and must define the all-locale HIG proof/finding structure before broader capture and review gates run.
